headline: Ross Gerber: Tesla + SpaceX merger would create 'Berkshire Hathaway of AI' — TSLA slips in premarket as speculation intensifies ahead of potential SpaceX IPO and H1 2027 merger timeline flagged by Wedbush

Tesla 2026.14.3 Spring Update hits 3rd wave rollout — Hey Grok voice AI, FSD app redesign, 24hr Dashcam, and Cyberhog Pet Mode now reaching broader fleet; Grok can now 'see' saved location labels for natural language nav

Dan Ives (Wedbush) forecasts Tesla-SpaceX merger in H1 2027 — Musk seeking to build unified AI conglomerate; Tesla's $2B SpaceX equity investment in Q1 seen as the financial bridge ahead of a formal combination

FSD v14.3.2 (2026.2.9.9) released — adds Blind Spot Warning While Parked, Supercharger Site Maps, and service mode improvements; marks rapid cadence of FSD point releases continuing post-v14 architecture launch
Tesla AI5 chip design finalized in April 2026 — next-generation inference processor completed at Tesla's Research Fab at Giga Texas; will power future FSD + Optimus workloads; successor to HW4/AI4+

Sweden approves Tesla FSD Supervised for public testing — 2nd EU member state greenlight after Netherlands; confirms EU regulatory cascade accelerating ahead of summer EU-wide harmonization; Tesla also unveils AI4+ FSD computer with more memory and compute for improved inference on all new-build vehicles

Tesla delays large-scale Robotaxi expansion until FSD v15 — Musk confirms v14.3 is 'last piece of the puzzle' for autonomy but v15 architectural upgrade is the gate for nationwide commercial scale; 2027 now base case for material robotaxi revenue
Tesla confirms Cybercab has NO production cap as ramp begins — Musk says volumes will scale 'exponentially by end of 2026'; demand-driven production model unlike any prior Tesla vehicle
